title: Implement tsk validate in Python
description: Implement validation: parse all issues, check JSON validity, workflow rules, hierarchy, referential integrity. Detailed error reporting.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented Python project validation: added maintenance.validate_project with issue/config checks, wired tsk validate CLI, and added tests for valid/invalid JSON, referential integrity, status/closed_at, and missing project. Tests: python -m pytest python/tests/test_maintenance.py, black python/src/taskulus/maintenance.py python/tests/test_maintenance.py python/src/taskulus/cli.py, ruff check python/src/taskulus/maintenance.py python/tests/test_maintenance.py python/src/taskulus/cli.py.
